pages.purpose: New user registration form — the entry point for all new users
pages.how_to_reach: Navigate to /register (or / which redirects there). No authentication required.
expected_features: Registration form with Full Name, Email Address, and Password fields
Inline error message area that appears on validation failure

pages.purpose: Authenticated user home screen showing personalised user info
pages.how_to_reach: Complete registration first; the form redirects to /dashboard on success. Alternatively navigate directly to /dashboard while holding a valid session cookie.
expected_features: User info section displaying Name and Email
expected_data: User's full name as entered during registration
User's email address as entered during registration

auth_flow.auth_action: Fill in the registration form with a unique name, email, and password (min 8 chars), then submit. The app sets a 'session' httpOnly cookie and redirects to /dashboard.

unauthenticated_behavior.expected: Accessing /dashboard without a valid session cookie redirects the user to /register
unauthenticated_behavior.test: Open a fresh browser context (no cookies), navigate directly to /dashboard, and verify the browser lands on /register

tasks: Navigate to /register and verify the registration form is present with three fields: Full Name, Email Address, Password
Submit the form with valid credentials (unique email, password >= 8 chars) and verify redirect to /dashboard
On the dashboard, verify the user's name and email are displayed

verification_tasks.description: User data persists after a page reload on the dashboard
verification_tasks.check: After successful registration and landing on /dashboard, reload the page and confirm the user's name and email are still displayed (not blank and not 'Loading user data...')
verification_tasks.derived_from: data_flows[0]: register writes to users store, GET /api/user/me reads it back

verification_tasks.description: Session cookie persists across navigation so the user stays authenticated
verification_tasks.check: After completing registration, navigate away to /register and then back to /dashboard without clearing cookies. Verify /dashboard renders user data rather than redirecting.

verification_tasks.description: Unauthenticated access to /dashboard is rejected with a redirect to /register
verification_tasks.check: In a fresh browser context with no cookies, navigate directly to /dashboard and verify the final URL is /register (or /)
